overview.what: A foundational web scraping tool that extracts structured data from static HTML pages. It's ideal for scraping blogs, news sites, or product catalogs that don't rely heavily on client-side JavaScript rendering.
overview.how_it_works: The scraper uses Axios to download the raw HTML of a target URL. It then loads this HTML into Cheerio, which provides a jQuery-like syntax for traversing the DOM and selecting specific elements by CSS selectors or class names.
what_you_learn: Using CSS selectors for data extraction
Exporting scraped data to JSON format

files.description: The main scraping script with selector logic.
